title: API endpoint "network inspect" doc doesn't list a well defined success result
body:
/kind bug

**Description**

Hi,

The [API endpoint inspect network](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#operation/NetworkInspectLibpod) doesn't provide a detailed result description for the success case. A possible result is shown in [the command reference](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/markdown/podman-network-inspect.1.html#example) but I don't know whether other result variations are possible.


**Describe the results you received:**
The [API endpoint inspect network](https://docs.podman.io/en/latest/_static/api.html#operation/NetworkInspectLibpod)  only lists: 
<!--StartFragment-->
property name* | object
-- | --
<!--EndFragment-->




**Describe the results you expected:**
A detailed definition of the expected json, similar to other API responses.
